name: VideoDownloader
short: Auto-downloads and reposts Instagram & Twitter/X videos.
description: Listens for Instagram and Twitter/X links in configured channels, downloads the video using yt-dlp, and reposts it as a Discord upload with attribution.
author: YourName
install_msg: Thanks for installing VideoDownloader! Run `[p]vdl settings` to get started. Make sure yt-dlp is installed: `pip install yt-dlp`
